author: claude
content: REAL + fixed. Copilot's claim at design-principles.rst:71 is correct: the worked example presented a privileged extension->BrowserManager failure socket as the preferred/shipped route, but no such channel exists (BrowserManager ClientSocket is send-only; extension's only outbound SendingSocket is fire-and-forget to StorageController; ext->BM startup is one-way file-based). The shipped path is actually the DOM marker (data-openwpm-instrument-error) read by GetCommand. Rewrote the example to describe the real mechanism + name it acknowledged-imperfect + note a privileged path needs new protocol. Commit 313f54cbb28f, fast-forward pushed to docs/design-principles. Thread replied + resolved. 0 unresolved Copilot threads remain on PR #1175 -- ready to close, leaving for Stefan.
